summary: Recent updates in the WebCodecs area have focused on improving the quality and maintainability of the code. By implementing **MOZ_LOG_FMT for logging**, developers can now better track issues related to video and audio processing, which is essential for technological features like real-time communication. Additionally, the updates included standardizing the use of a defined version of the "globals" npm module, ensuring consistency across the project. These changes help create a more robust environment for WebCodecs, the technology enabling direct access to encoded audio and video data in web applications, ultimately enhancing performance and stability for end-users.
